justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed reasonable alternatives, but did not offer a wide range of options when the initial requests were unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made several redundant API calls when expanding the search for available slots.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly fine, but the repeated unavailability messages without offering a broader range of alternatives could be slightly frustrating.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well by expanding the search, but the repeated unavailability for 10 AM slots without suggesting other times earlier in the conversation was a minor friction point.
